text:
is a single by Megumi Hayashibara. The single was published by King Records via its label STARCHILD with the catalog number KICM-1271, it was released on 22 April 2009. https://vgmdb.net/album/35771 It contains the theme song of the CR Neon Genesis Evangelion ~The Beginning and the End~ pachinko machine .
